instructions: For each test case: place the audio file in test_data/audio/ and the ground truth lyrics in test_data/ground_truth/ (plain text).

samples.notes: Atlanta trap style, AAVE, ad-libs throughout

challenge_tag_definitions.mumble: Intentionally slurred or mumbled delivery style
challenge_tag_definitions.heavy_slang: Dense use of slang, regional dialect, or AAVE
challenge_tag_definitions.accent_dialect: Strong regional accent (Southern, NY, UK drill, etc.)
challenge_tag_definitions.wordplay: Dense double entendres, homophones, or unusual word usage
